scores.correctness_notes: Fully correct. Covers all key points: CollectStatusEvent fires at end of every hook, priority order (error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active), add_status() usage, collect_unit_status vs collect_app_status, leader-only app status. Also correctly notes that ErrorStatus/UnknownStatus cannot be passed to add_status() is not mentioned but no incorrect info is given. The component/library pattern is a correct bonus.
